payload.notes: Order ORD-1887 found for Hannah. Item: Linen Midi Dress - Sage M, Status: Delivered. Issue reported: damaged_item with negative sentiment.

payload.rationale: Item is clearly damaged (torn seam) and has been delivered; policy prefers refund for damaged delivered items.

payload.english: Hi Hannah, we are truly sorry to hear that your Linen Midi Dress arrived with a torn seam. We understand how disappointing this must be. We have approved a full refund of RM 129.00 for your order ORD-1887. The refund will be processed to your original payment method shortly. Thank you for your patience, and please let us know if you need any further assistance.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Salam Hannah, kami amat minta maaf kerana Linen Midi Dress anda tiba dengan jahitan yang koyak. Kami faham betapa kecewanya situasi ini. Kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik penuh sebanyak RM 129.00 untuk pesanan ORD-1887 anda. Bayaran balik akan diproses ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda tidak lama lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda, dan sila hubungi kami jika memerlukan bantuan lanjut.

payload.supervisor_note: High confidence refund for damaged delivered item aligns with policy. No escalation needed.

payload.notes: Order found for Hannah. Status: DELIVERED. Issue: damaged_item.

payload.rationale: The customer reports a damaged item for an order that exists in the system.

payload.english: Hi Hannah, we are sorry that Linen Midi Dress - Sage M arrived damaged. We have approved a refund MYR 129.00 to your original payment method. Please allow a few business days for it to appear.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Hannah, kami mohon maaf kerana Linen Midi Dress - Sage M tiba dalam keadaan rosak. Kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik MYR 129.00 ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda. Sila berikan beberapa hari bekerja untuk ia dipaparkan.

payload.notes: Order found for Aina. Status: SHIPPED. Issue: delivery_delay.

payload.rationale: The issue can likely be resolved by arranging a replacement or delivery follow-up.

payload.english: Hi Aina, we are sorry for the issue with Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. We will arrange a replacement or delivery follow-up and update you shortly.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Aina, kami mohon maaf atas isu berkaitan Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. Kami akan mengatur penggantian atau semakan penghantaran dan mengemas kini anda tidak lama lagi.
